title: Nizam Planning Manifest Schema
description: Validates docs/planning/manifest.json, the top-level planning index that names the current phase and lists every phase the repository tracks, per the Session Startup Sequence ('Check manifest' step).

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the manifest document shape itself.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 date or date-time the manifest was last updated.

current_phase.description: The id of the phase currently active for this repository.

phases.description: Every phase this repository tracks, in the order they were planned.

feature_list.description: Repository-relative path to the feature_list.json driving this phase.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the phase.
